com.xilinx.rapidwright.design.noc

Class NOCMaster

  • Object
    • com.xilinx.rapidwright.design.noc.NOCClient
      • com.xilinx.rapidwright.design.noc.NOCMaster
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable

    public class NOCMaster
extends NOCClient
implements Serializable
    Represents an AXI Master instance of the NOC
    Since:
    2022.1.0
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      NOCMaster()
      Creates an empty NOC master client.
      NOCMaster(org.json.JSONObject json)
      Creates a NOC master client from a JSON client description.
      NOCMaster(NOCMaster nm)
      Creates a copy of an existing NOC master client.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      NOCConnection getConnectionTo(String slaveName)
      Gets the corresponding connection based on slave client name.
      TrafficClass getReadTC()
      Gets the traffic class for master reads.
      TrafficClass getWriteTC()
      Gets the traffic class for master writes.
      void setReadTC(TrafficClass readTC)
      Sets the traffic class for master reads.
      void setWriteTC(TrafficClass writeTC)
      Sets the traffic class for master writes.
      org.json.JSONObject toJSONObject()
      Converts this master client to its JSON representation.

        Creates an empty NOC master client.

    • Method Detail

      • getConnectionTo

        public NOCConnection getConnectionTo(String slaveName)
        Gets the corresponding connection based on slave client name.
        Parameters:
        slaveName - The name of the slave client that connects to this master.
        Returns:
        The connection between the provided slave client name and this master or null if none found.
        Since:
        2022.1.1

      • toJSONObject

        public org.json.JSONObject toJSONObject()
        Converts this master client to its JSON representation.
        Overrides:
        toJSONObject in class NOCClient
        Returns:
        The JSON representation of this master client.
        Since:
        2026.1.0

        public TrafficClass getWriteTC()
        Gets the traffic class for master writes.
        Returns:
        The traffic class for master writes.
        Since:
        2022.1.1

        Gets the traffic class for master reads.

        Since:
        2022.1.1

      • setWriteTC

        public void setWriteTC(TrafficClass writeTC)
        Sets the traffic class for master writes.

        Since:
        2026.1.0
